g.text: - we need to handle ingestion of content from thousands of publishers and the efficient delivery of that content to millions of users

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1) Users should be able to view an aggregated feed of news articles from thousands of source publishers all over the world

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Data Collection Service: Polls publisher RSS feeds and APIs every 3-6 hours based on each publishers frequency.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Publishers: Thousands of news sources wordwide that provide content via RSS feeds or APIs

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: A. RSS is a simple XML format that allows publishers to syndicate their content to other websites and readers

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Q. Why store images in our own Object Storage?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: A. We download and store images in our own object storage to ensure fast, reliable, and consistent delivery.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This avoids dependence on publisher servers, which may be slow or unavailable, and lets us optimize image size, format,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: and quality for a better user experience

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2) Users should be able to scroll through the feed "infinitely"

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Client automatically sends GET request to /feed?region=US&limit=20&page=2

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Feed Service calculates the offset (page-1 * limit) and fetches the next 20 articles

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Database query fetches articles with OFFSET and LIMIT clauses

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Process repeats as user continues scrolling through pages

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3) Users can click an article to read the full content

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - News aggregators don't host articles. When a user clicks an article, the browser redirects to the publisher's URL stored in our database.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - In production, clicks typically go through a tracking endpoint that logs analytics and returns a 302 redirect to the publisher's website.

g.text: 1) How can we improve pagination consistency and efficiency?

Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Duplicates or missing articles when new rows are inserted

g.text: 2) How do we achieve low latency (< 200ms) feed requests?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Good Sol: Sorted set(timestamp) Redis Cache with TTL

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - During cache expiration periods, all users requesting feeds for a region hit the database simultaneously, creating

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - users might not see new articles for up to 30 minutes

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Better Sol: Realtime Cached Feeds with CDC

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - When new articles are published, CDC triggers immediately update the relevant regional caches without

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - When adding new articles, we use Redis ZADD to insert the article with its timestamp score,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: then immediately call ZREMRANGEBYRANK(Removes all elements in the sorted set stored at key with rank between start and stop.)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: with negative indices to remove the oldest articles beyond our limit.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This ensures each regional cache stays at a manageable size while providing enough content for users to scroll through several pages.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - For feed requests, we simply read from the pre-computed Redis sorted sets using ZREVRANGE

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (Is a Redis command used to retrieve a specific range of members from a Sorted Set in descending order (highest score to lowest).)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3) How do we ensure articles appear in feeds within 30 minutes of publication?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - today's fast-paced news environment, a delay of several hours makes our news feed feel stale and irrelevant.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Increased RSS polling with Prioritizing polling with different intervals based on Collection Service (Publishers)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Increased RSS polling + WebScraping( slower and less reliable than RSS parsing)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - flips our model from pull-based to push-based by implementing webhooks where publishers notify us immediately

Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Your server has no way to know whether the request came from a trusted publisher or an attacker.

Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
